nodes.title: Gojoseon Founded
nodes.description: Korea's first kingdom is founded by Dangun.

nodes.title: Silla Founded
nodes.description: The kingdom of Silla rises in the southeast.

nodes.title: Goguryeo Founded
nodes.description: Goguryeo emerges as a powerful northern kingdom.

nodes.title: Baekje Founded
nodes.description: Baekje is established in the southwest.

nodes.title: Unified Silla
nodes.description: Silla unifies most of the Korean peninsula.

nodes.title: Goryeo Dynasty
nodes.description: Goryeo reunites the peninsula and gives Korea its name.

nodes.title: Joseon Dynasty
nodes.description: Yi Seong-gye founds the long-lived Joseon dynasty.

nodes.title: Imjin War
nodes.description: Korea repels Japanese invasions under Admiral Yi.

nodes.title: Late Joseon Renaissance
nodes.description: King Jeongjo drives a cultural and reform revival.

nodes.title: Korean Empire
nodes.description: Joseon is proclaimed the Korean Empire.

nodes.title: Japanese Occupation
nodes.description: Korea is annexed by Imperial Japan.

nodes.title: Republic of Korea
nodes.description: South Korea is established in the south.

nodes.title: North Korea (DPRK)
nodes.description: North Korea is established in the north.
